channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4074] Failure on test suite conf-sanity test_32b
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/5877a374-2e0f-11e3-a89d-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_32b failed with the following error:

test_32b failed with 1

test log shows:

CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param t32fs.quota.mdt=ug
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
Changed after 0s: from '' to 'none'
Waiting 90 secs for update
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
Updated after 6s: wanted 'ug' got 'ug'
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param t32fs.quota.ost=ug
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
Changed after 0s: from '' to 'none'
Waiting 90 secs for update
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: wtm-10vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
Updated after 6s: wanted 'ug' got 'ug'
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups:
 [dd] [if=/dev/zero] [of=/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_new] [bs=1M] [count=20] [oflag=sync]
dd: writing `/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_new': No space left on device
8+0 records in
7+0 records out
7340032 bytes (7.3 MB) copied, 33.9893 s, 216 kB/s
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups:
 [createmany] [-m] [/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_] [2]
mknod(/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_1) error: Disk quota exceeded
total: 1 creates in 0.00 seconds: 306.94 creates/second
 - unlinked 0 (time 1380983730 ; total 0 ; last 0)
unlink(/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_1) error: No such file or directory
total: 1 unlinks in 0 seconds: inf unlinks/second
dd: writing `/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/tmp_file': No space left on device
1+0 records in
0+0 records out
0 bytes (0 B) copied, 0.742719 s, 0.0 kB/s
 conf-sanity test_32b: @@@@@@ FAIL: dd failed 
  Trace dump:
item.summary: Failure on test suite conf-sanity test_32b

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
I think we believed that was a problem with LU-2687 patch?
Is this not true?
